content.en:
"Lord Ye Tianguo, I want to trade the Eternal Decree in your hand!"

Qinghe Daoist said.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I said that I have to take out the treasure resources I need before I am willing to trade." "

However, the Qinghe Dao Lord said, "Lord Ye Tianguo, I think you should need these resources. "

The Qinghe Dao Master casually took out some ordinary resources, which were all things that Ye Tian didn't need much.

"Qinghe Daoist, what do you mean by this?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's very simple, trade that new eternal kingdom decree to me, and everyone will be happy!" Qinghe Dao Master This is a direct threat.

"Qinghe Daoist, are you threatening me?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"It's okay if you say yes!" said the Qinghe Dao Master.

"What if I don't want to trade?"

Ye Tian's tone also became sharp.

"Then" one-two-seven, "I don't dare to guarantee that something will happen when you go out outside the eternal path of your human race?"

Qinghe Dao Master directly threatened, and he was not afraid of Ye Tian.

The Alliance of the Kingdom of All Gods had a rule that the lords of the kingdom could not be forced to transfer the Eternal State Order, and he did not dare to violate the rules.

However, Ye Tian has a superfluous eternal national order, and he directly comes to threaten him, so he doesn't care about this.

He really needs an Eternal State Decree, so he doesn't care about offending Ye Tian.

"Qinghe Daoist, you are looking for death!!!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Looking for death?, can you beat me?" Before leaving, the Dao Lord of Qinghe said, "Lord Ye Tianguo, I will give you 10,000 Dao Era time to consider. "

With that, he vanished.

......

"It seems that the Eternal Dao Realm of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance still doesn't understand my strength, so let's take the Qinghe Dao Master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he applied to the Nine Extremes Alliance for a death battle within the Nine Extremes Alliance, and the target of the application for a death battle was the Qinghe Dao Master.

This application shocked Qin He and many other powerhouses who had transcended the Eternal Dao Realm in half a step.

Nine Extremes Void.

Qin He found Ye Tian.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, why did you apply to the Qinghe Dao Lord for a death battle, the death battle was reluctantly started because the internal relations of the ninth-level alliance were in a state of mortal enemies, what contradiction do you have with the Qinghe Dao Master?" Qin He asked.

"Lord Qinhe, Lord Qinghe Dao forcibly bought my Eternal State Order, if I don't agree, he will threaten me, for the safety of my family, I decided to fight him to the death. I remember that once you apply, no one else can interfere unless the other party refuses. Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Qin He nodded.

Subsequently, he persuaded again, but he did not dispel Ye Tian's thoughts.

The other side.

The Qinghe Dao Master also received Ye Tian's application for a death battle, and he was immediately annoyed.

"He even applied for a death battle against me, looking for death!"

Without saying a word, he agreed directly.

If you can kill Ye Tian and seize Ye Tian's Eternal National Order, then it will be fine.

However.

There were still many Eternal Dao realm persuasions, but they didn't stop them.

Soon, the Pact of Death was formed.

......

Death Zone.

this day.

Ye Tian and the Qinghe Dao Lord came here, and there were many Eternal Dao Realms and country lords who came to watch the battle, and even the Qinhe country lord came.

The battle to the death is formed, and other Eternal Dao realms are not allowed to participate.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, I just want to buy your Eternal State Order, but you have to fight me to the death. If you regret it now and sell me the Eternal Decree, how about we break the contract to the death at a small price?"

Qinghe Road is the main road.

He decided that Ye Tian would not agree, so he just said it.

"Let's fight!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian and the Qinghe Dao Lord killed each other.

In the eyes of many Eternal Dao Realms and Country Lords, Ye Tian should be crushed by Qinghe Dao Lords, after all, Qinghe Dao Lord's Eternal Dao Body is complete, while Ye Tian is only an Eternal Dao Body Dacheng Realm.

......

"Qinhe Country Lord, why is Ye Tian's strength still above the Qinghe Dao Lord?, isn't this reasonable?" an Eternal Dao Realm asked curiously.

Qin He also frowned, he couldn't figure it out.

"There is a high probability that the Eternal Dao Seed that Ye Tian cultivated is a very powerful kind of high-level Eternal Dao Seed, and Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed is already on the road of growth, and the strength of his Eternal Dao Seed should be far above the Qinghe Dao Master. "

Qin He guessed.

"What, the Lord of Ye Tianguo has only attained the Eternal Dao Body, and he has already strengthened the Eternal Dao Species?"

Many Eternal Dao Realms were shocked.

"So soon, the Qinghe Dao Lord is in danger!" said a country lord.......

"That's not for sure, Qinghe Daoist has a lot of background, maybe there are hole cards!" said another country master.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian and the Qinghe Dao Lord had been killing for a long time, and suddenly the Qinghe Dao Lord urged an eternal primordial treasure on his body, and the aura on his body began to skyrocket.

However, judging from the expression and urgency of the Qinghe Dao Master, this Eternal Primordial Treasure had some sequelae, so he didn't dare to last too long, wanting to end the battle quickly.

However, Ye Tian's strength was still too strong.

Ye Tian's Dao Seed Secret Technique is too powerful, and his body is not inferior to that of Qinghe Dao Master.

However, at this level, it was still a little difficult to kill the Qinghe Dao Master.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian no longer hides his strength.

Airplanes!

The other replica body comes out of the inside of the body.

Whew!!

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian's three replica bodies besieged Ye Tian at the same time.

"This is my One Qi Transformation Three Qing Dao Secret Technique, watch me kill you!"

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian instantly suppressed the Qinghe Dao Lord, who had no power to resist.

"Fart's Dao Secret Technique, this is clearly a clone!!!!"

The Daoist Master of Qinghe was speechless.

But even if it is a clone, it is Ye Tian, who is naturally allowed to fight, and Ye Tian did not violate the rules of fighting to the death.

......

"What, the Lord of the Ye Heavenly Kingdom still has a clone with the same strength as the body!"

"It is very rare to have an eternal Dao realm with a clone, not to mention that the clone also has the strength of the body, 4.9 means that the clone has also practiced the Eternal Dao Species, which is equivalent to spending three parts of resources to improve himself!"

"If I have such a clone, I am willing to spend three times as many resources to improve!"

"Qinghe Dao Lord doesn't dare to provoke Ye Tianguo Lord, now it's dangerous!"

"In the battle to the death, we can't stop it!"

"It depends on whether Ye Tian will let go of the Qinghe Dao Master, but it is obviously unlikely. "

Soon.

The body of the Qinghe Dao Lord was pierced by Ye Tian.

Gradually, the Qinghe Dao Master's injuries became more and more serious, and he couldn't compete with Ye Tian at all.

Hiss!

The body of the Qinghe Dao Lord was torn apart, and he was severely injured and dying in a short time.

"Die!"

The three replica bodies attacked with all their strength at the same time, and the Dao Seed Secret Technique bombarded his body, killing him instantly.
